---
title: "AI Notes"
sidebarTitle: "AI Notes"
description: "Notes that write themselves. Octolane captures key details from every interaction and attaches them to the right deal or contact."
---

Octolane generates notes automatically from your emails, meetings, and agent activity. Key details, decisions, and context are captured and attached to the right deal, contact, or company - without you typing anything.

## Auto-generated notes

When a significant interaction happens - an important email exchange, a meeting, a deal stage change - Octolane creates a note summarizing what happened. These notes capture:

- Key decisions made
- Pricing or budget discussions
- Next steps agreed upon
- Important context or objections raised
- Changes in stakeholders or timeline

## Manual notes

You can also create notes manually on any deal, contact, or company page. Type them yourself or dictate them via AI Chat (e.g., "Add a note to the Acme deal: they need board approval before proceeding").

## Finding notes

Notes appear in the Activity Feed on the relevant record page. You can also search across all notes using the global search bar.
